## 🎯 PHASE 1: PRE-DEPLOYMENT (CRITICAL - DO NOW)

### Task 1.1: Push Code to GitHub
**Priority:** CRITICAL  
**Estimated Time:** 5 minutes  
**Assignee:** Repository Owner

**Commands:**
```bash
cd /home/teacherchris37

# Option 1: Using HTTPS with PAT (Personal Access Token)
git push https://<TOKEN>@github.com/youngstunners88/ihhashi.git work:main

# Option 2: Using SSH (if SSH keys configured)
git push origin work:main

# Option 3: Set upstream and push
git push --set-upstream origin work:main
```

**Verification:**
```bash
git log --oneline origin/main -5
```

---

### Task 1.2: Build Android APK
**Priority:** CRITICAL  
**Estimated Time:** 15-30 minutes  
**Assignee:** Development Agent

**Prerequisites:**
- Node.js 18+ installed
- Android Studio installed
- Android SDK configured

**Build Commands:**
```bash
# Navigate to frontend
cd /home/teacherchris37/frontend

# Install dependencies
npm install

# Build web assets
npm run build

# Sync with Capacitor
npx cap sync android

# Open Android Studio
npx cap open android

# In Android Studio:
# 1. Build → Generate Signed Bundle/APK
# 2. Select APK
# 3. Create/Select keystore
# 4. Build release APK
```

**Alternative (Command Line):**
```bash
cd /home/teacherchris37/frontend/android

# Generate debug APK (for testing)
./gradlew assembleDebug

# Generate release APK (requires keystore)
./gradlew assembleRelease
```

**Output Location:**
- Debug: `frontend/android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk`
- Release: `frontend/android/app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release-unsigned.apk`

**Verification:**
```bash
ls -la frontend/android/app/build/outputs/apk/release/
```

---

### Task 1.3: Verify App Icons
**Priority:** HIGH  
**Estimated Time:** 10 minutes  
**Assignee:** UI Agent

**Check Locations:**
```
frontend/android/app/src/main/res/
├── mipmap-mdpi/
│   └── ic_launcher.png (48x48)
├── mipmap-hdpi/
│   └── ic_launcher.png (72x72)
├── mipmap-xhdpi/
│   └── ic_launcher.png (96x96)
├── mipmap-xxhdpi/
│   └── ic_launcher.png (144x144)
├── mipmap-xxxhdpi/
│   └── ic_launcher.png (192x192)
```

**If Missing - Generate Icons:**
```bash
# Using ImageMagick or online tool
# Source image: frontend/public/assets/icon-small.jpg
# Convert to all required sizes

# Or use capacitor icon generator
npx capacitor-assets generate --iconBackgroundColor '#FFD700' --iconForegroundColor '#1A1A1A'
```

---

## 🎯 PHASE 2: GOOGLE PLAY STORE SETUP

### Task 2.1: Create Google Play Console Account
**Priority:** CRITICAL  
**Estimated Time:** 30 minutes  
**Assignee:** Business Owner

**Steps:**
1. Visit https://play.google.com/console
2. Sign in with Google account
3. Pay one-time $25 registration fee
4. Complete developer profile:
   - Developer name: iHhashi (Pty) Ltd
   - Email: support@ihhashi.co.za
   - Website: https://ihhashi.co.za

**Verification:** Account active within 24-48 hours

---

### Task 2.2: Create App Listing
**Priority:** CRITICAL  
**Estimated Time:** 1 hour  
**Assignee:** Marketing Agent

**App Details:**
```
App Name: iHhashi - Food Delivery South Africa
Short Description: Your Delivery Horse - Fast food, groceries & more delivered
Full Description: [See docs/PLAY_STORE_CHECKLIST.md Section 12]
```

**Required Assets:**
- [ ] App icon (512x512 PNG)
- [ ] Feature graphic (1024x500 PNG/JPG)
- [ ] Phone screenshots (4-8 images, min 320px, max 3840px)
- [ ] Tablet screenshots (optional, 7-inch and 10-inch)

**Category:**
- Primary: Food & Drink
- Secondary: Shopping

**Content Rating:**
- Questionnaire completion required
- Expected: Everyone (PEGI 3)

---

### Task 2.3: Upload APK/AAB
**Priority:** CRITICAL  
**Estimated Time:** 15 minutes  
**Assignee:** Development Agent

**Steps:**
1. Go to Google Play Console
2. Select "iHhashi" app
3. Go to Release → Production
4. Click "Create new release"
5. Upload APK or App Bundle
6. Enter release notes:

```
Release 1.0.0:
- South Africa's delivery platform
- Food, groceries, fresh produce delivery
- Blue Horse verified merchants
- Multi-modal delivery (walking, bicycle, motorbike)
- Real-time order tracking
- 45-day free trial for delivery partners
```

---

## 🎯 PHASE 3: WEBSITE DEPLOYMENT (HOST LEGAL DOCS)

### Task 3.1: Deploy Static Site
**Priority:** CRITICAL (required for Play Store)  
**Estimated Time:** 30 minutes  
**Assignee:** DevOps Agent

**Option 1: Netlify (Recommended - Free)**
```bash
# Install Netlify CLI
npm install -g netlify-cli

# Deploy
cd /home/teacherchris37/frontend
cp -r docs/legal dist/
netlify deploy --prod --dir=dist
```

**Option 2: Vercel**
```bash
# Install Vercel CLI
npm install -g vercel

# Deploy
vercel --prod
```

**Option 3: GitHub Pages**
```bash
# Already configured in render.yaml
# Just push to trigger deploy
```

**Required Routes:**
```
https://ihhashi.co.za/privacy          → PRIVACY_POLICY.md
https://ihhashi.co.za/terms            → TERMS_OF_SERVICE.md
https://ihhashi.co.za/cookies          → COOKIE_POLICY.md
https://ihhashi.co.za/partner-agreement → DELIVERY_PARTNER_AGREEMENT.md
```

**Verification:**
```bash
curl -s https://ihhashi.co.za/privacy | head -20
curl -s https://ihhashi.co.za/terms | head -20
```

---

## 🎯 PHASE 4: TESTING & QUALITY ASSURANCE

### Task 4.1: Pre-Submission Testing
**Priority:** HIGH  
**Estimated Time:** 2-3 hours  
**Assignee:** QA Agent

**Device Testing Matrix:**
| Device | OS Version | Test |
|--------|------------|------|
| Samsung Galaxy S21 | Android 14 | Primary |
| Samsung Galaxy A32 | Android 12 | Mid-range |
| Google Pixel 6 | Android 13 | Reference |
| Budget Android | Android 10 | Performance |

**Test Scenarios:**
- [ ] App launch and splash screen
- [ ] User registration with phone
- [ ] Browse merchants
- [ ] Place order
- [ ] Payment processing
- [ ] Order tracking
- [ ] Partner sign-up flow
- [ ] Location services
- [ ] Background/foreground switching
- [ ] Offline mode behavior

**Performance Checks:**
- [ ] Cold start < 3 seconds
- [ ] APK size < 50MB
- [ ] Memory usage < 150MB
- [ ] No ANR (Application Not Responding)
- [ ] No crashes during testing

---

### Task 4.2: Content Compliance Check
**Priority:** HIGH  
**Estimated Time:** 30 minutes  
**Assignee:** Legal Agent

**Verify:**
- [ ] Privacy policy link working
- [ ] Terms of service accessible
- [ ] No prohibited content (gambling, drugs, etc.)
- [ ] Age restrictions for alcohol (if applicable)
- [ ] Intellectual property compliance
- [ ] Accessibility features (TalkBack compatible)

---

## 🎯 PHASE 5: LAUNCH

### Task 5.1: Closed Testing (Internal)
**Priority:** HIGH  
**Estimated Time:** 3-7 days  
**Assignee:** Product Owner

**Steps:**
1. Add 20-50 internal testers
2. Send invite links
3. Collect feedback via Google Forms
4. Fix critical issues
5. Update release

---

### Task 5.2: Open Testing (Beta)
**Priority:** MEDIUM  
**Estimated Time:** 1-2 weeks  
**Assignee:** Growth Agent

**Steps:**
1. Enable open testing track
2. Promote to limited audience
3. Monitor crash reports
4. Gather ratings and reviews
5. Address feedback

---

### Task 5.3: Production Release
**Priority:** CRITICAL  
**Estimated Time:** 1 day  
**Assignee:** Product Owner

**Launch Checklist:**
- [ ] All tests passing
- [ ] Legal docs hosted and linked
- [ ] Privacy policy URL in app
- [ ] Contact information complete
- [ ] Screenshots uploaded
- [ ] App description finalized
- [ ] Release notes prepared
- [ ] Rollout percentage: 10% → 50% → 100%

**Post-Launch Monitoring:**
- [ ] Crash rate < 1%
- [ ] ANR rate < 0.5%
- [ ] User ratings > 4.0
- [ ] Daily active users tracked

## 🐛 KNOWN ISSUES & MITIGATION

### Issue 1: GitHub Authentication
**Impact:** BLOCKER - Cannot push code  
**Solution:**
```bash
# Generate PAT at https://github.com/settings/tokens
# Or configure SSH keys
git remote set-url origin git@github.com:youngstunners88/ihhashi.git
```

### Issue 2: Missing App Icons
**Impact:** HIGH - Play Store rejection risk  
**Solution:** Generate icons from `icon-small.jpg`

### Issue 3: Unbuilt APK
**Impact:** BLOCKER - Cannot submit to Play Store  
**Solution:** Execute build commands in Phase 1.2

### Issue 4: Unhosted Legal Docs
**Impact:** BLOCKER - Play Store requires privacy policy URL  
**Solution:** Deploy to Netlify/Vercel (Phase 3.1)

## 🚀 DEPLOYMENT COMMAND CHEAT SHEET

```bash
# 1. PUSH TO GITHUB
cd /home/teacherchris37
git push origin work:main

# 2. BUILD APK
cd frontend
npm install && npm run build
npx cap sync android
cd android
./gradlew assembleRelease

# 3. DEPLOY WEBSITE
cd /home/teacherchris37/frontend
npm install -g netlify-cli
netlify deploy --prod --dir=dist

# 4. VERIFY DEPLOYMENT
curl https://ihhashi.co.za/privacy
curl https://ihhashi.co.za/terms
ls frontend/android/app/build/outputs/apk/release/
```
